deltaNote: vs. ~37,000 at start of Trump second term; record high

contestNote: Competing analysis estimates $135B in disruption costs; DOGE cuts hampered US Iran-war readiness per CNN (Apr 2026)

label: S&P 500 (All-Time High Apr 24)
deltaNote: S&P 500 set new all-time high of 7,165.08 on Apr 24 — surpassing Apr 15 record of 7,022.95; rally led by AI mega-caps (Nvidia, Microsoft, Meta) and Intel's strong quarter; year-end analyst median target 7,650

label: WTI Crude Oil Price
deltaNote: WTI surged from $87–91 back to $95–97 on Apr 25 as Trump issued 'shoot and kill' order for Iranian mine-laying boats and Araghchi delivered war-end demands in Islamabad; up 17%+ for the week; Brent near $100; Hormuz blockade continues

label: UMich Consumer Sentiment (Final Apr 2026)
source: University of Michigan Surveys of Consumers — Final April Reading (Apr 2026)
deltaNote: Final April reading 49.8 (preliminary was 47.6); down 6.6% from March; year-ahead inflation expectations at 4.8%; lowest on record in consistently-tracked history since 1978; driven by Iran war oil prices, tariff-era cost increases, and ~20K/month jobs growth since Jan 2025

label: Artemis II Mission Status
deltaNote: All four crew safe — Wiseman, Glover, Koch, Hansen recovered by USS John P. Murtha off San Diego; farthest crewed spaceflight at 252,756 mi

label: Iran Ceasefire / Hormuz Status
contestNote: Araghchi left Islamabad; Trump canceled Witkoff/Kushner trip citing 'time-wasting'; Iran refuses to drop blockade-lifting demand; Trump says Iran 'offered lot, but not enough'; WTI holding ~$95–97/bbl; FISA 702 expires Apr 30; FOMC Apr 28–29
deltaNote: Araghchi left Pakistan Apr 26; Trump canceled Islamabad envoy mission; Iran FM says no 'forced negotiations'; core deadlock: Trump demands enrichment halt, Iran demands blockade lifted; WHCD shooting adds security dimension; ceasefire technically intact but under strain

label: ICE/Border Patrol Budget Reconciliation
contestNote: Senate passed budget reconciliation resolution 50–48 at 3:30 a.m. Apr 23, instructing committees to produce $70B in new ICE/Border Patrol funding; must pass House before funds allocated; bypasses Democratic filibuster; Rand Paul only Republican to vote for war powers resolution same night
deltaNote: Senate all-night vote Apr 23 passed DHS reconciliation resolution; House must still approve; $70B would fund ICE expansion toward 1M/year deportation target
